cards.back: A type of machine learning algorithm inspired by the structure and function of the human brain
A type of machine learning where the algorithm is trained on labeled data to make predictions
A type of machine learning where the algorithm is trained on unlabeled data to identify patterns or relationships
A subset of machine learning that uses neural networks with multiple layers to analyze data
A common challenge in machine learning where the model is too complex and performs well on the training data but poorly on new data
A challenge in machine learning where the model's performance is affected by its ability to fit the training data (bias) and its ability to generalize (variance)
A series of steps involved in building and deploying a machine learning model, including data collection, data preprocessing, model training, model evaluation, and model deployment
A type of machine learning application that uses algorithms to recommend products or services to users based on their past behavior and preferences
A type of machine learning application that uses algorithms to analyze medical images and patient data to diagnose diseases and predict treatment outcomes
A type of machine learning that uses algorithms to analyze and generate human language, with applications in text classification, sentiment analysis, and language translation
